TMW Intelligence

Ask anything about this market.

Try: what's breaking ground in 2026? tallest tower in pipeline most active firm

The global residences pipeline

We're tracking 469 new residences developments worldwide — with the deepest pipelines in Miami (75), West Palm Beach (36), Nashville (18).

194 under construction, 29 breaking ground, 43 opening soon, and 62 already open in the dataset.

How we built this list

Every project on this page is from our live database of new and under-construction developments worldwide. We add a project only after we can confirm it from a public filing, an official announcement, or independent reporting; status changes (breaking ground, topping out, opening) are sourced the same way and timestamped. Pro members get full access to TMW Intelligence’s prediction modeling, Atlas data compilation, Pulse notifications, personalized notifications, comparison view, watchlists, and more.

Common questions

Frequently asked

Which cities have the most new condos?
The deepest condos pipelines are in Miami (75), West Palm Beach (36), Nashville (18), New York City (15), Fort Lauderdale (13). We track 469 condos projects total across 138 cities.
How many new condos are under construction worldwide?
194 condos are currently under construction worldwide. Plus 29 breaking ground, 43 opening soon, and 139 announced in the global pipeline.
What new condos are opening soon worldwide?
43 condos are flagged Opening Soon — meaning expected opening within ~7 months. Browse each individually in the pipeline grid above.
What condos have just been announced for 2026?
139 condos are in the announced phase across our global dataset. Each links to a live status page that updates as construction begins.
What is the tallest new condo in the global pipeline?
Jeddah Tower in Saudi Arabia at 157 floors. See the project →
Who is the most active developer in condos worldwide?
Related Group leads the condos category with 14 active projects. Their firm page shows every market they're building in.
Who designs the most new condos?
Arquitectonica is the architect of record on 57 condos projects in our global dataset.
How many total residential units are coming online in new condos?
Across the active global condos pipeline, the developments we track will add 248,871 residential units.
When will the next wave of new condos deliver?
Delivery dates across the active global pipeline run from 2017 through 2040. Pro members get our weekly Slippage Report flagging which projects have slipped this week.
How often is the condos development data updated?
Hourly. Our cron pipeline pulls fresh project data every hour and regenerates every market page. A status change confirmed today shows up within ~60 minutes.
